Dialog.name: SYS_DIFFICULTY_INFO_SAFE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Your party auto-revives after defeat. {f 0 1 43}Your choice of difficulty will not affect the story and can be changed at any time (excluding Heartless).{f 0 1 27}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_DIFFICULTY_INFO_EASY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Low-stress combat. {f 0 1 43}Your choice of difficulty will not affect the story and can be changed at any time (excluding Heartless).{f 0 1 27}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_DIFFICULTY_INFO_NORM
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Moderately challenging combat. {f 0 1 43}Your choice of difficulty will not affect the story and can be changed at any time (excluding Heartless).{f 0 1 27}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_DIFFICULTY_INFO_HARD
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Significantly challenging combat. {f 0 1 43}Your choice of difficulty will not affect the story and can be changed at any time (excluding Heartless).{f 0 1 27}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_DIFFICULTY_INFO_HEAR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Exceedingly challenging combat. {f 0 1 43}Your choice of difficulty will not affect the story and can be changed at any time, but you cannot return to Heartless once leaving it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_SAVE_VERSION_ERROR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Unable to resume play. The loaded save data and game version do not match.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_SAVE_EPISODE_ERROR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Unable to resume play. The loaded save data does not match the selected story episode.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_VELVETROOM_INFO_INHE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}When summoning from the Compendium, you now have the option to use the one carried over from the main story.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Press {f 1 3 118} to switch between the two Compendiums.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Summoning from the carried-over Compendium will cost more than usual. You must also be at the same level or higher than the desired Persona.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_CONF_DIFF_CHECK_ASTR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If you reduce the difficulty from the highest level, you won't be able to change it back. Are you sure you want to proceed?[n]{f 1 5 0}{f 1 4 1}{f 1 1}
